config.enable.title: Enable
config.enable.tooltip: Accepts available 'help wanted' quests automatically in the beginning of the day.
config.show_notifications.title: Display notification
config.show_notifications.tooltip: Displays a notification when a quest is accepted.
config.play_sound.title: Play sound
config.play_sound.tooltip: Plays a sound when a quest is accepted.
config.ignore_friends.title:
Ignore quests from villagers
with full friendship
config.ignore_friends.tooltip: Quests from villagers you have reached maximum friendship with will be ignored.
